result.reason: Implement functionality to import connection backups from Microsoft Remote Desktop Client.
result.approach: Analyze Microsoft Remote Desktop Client backup format, implement a new deserializer to parse the backup file, map its properties to mRemoteNG connection objects, and add a UI entry point for the import process. Include comprehensive unit tests.
